nodes.title: PHASE 1.1: Clean warm.py - Remove old WarmNode class
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Open graphics/warm.py
- Identify and KEEP: CozyNoteEditor class (used by WarmNode in node_types.py)
- REMOVE: Old WarmNode class definition (now in node_types.py)
- REMOVE: Any duplicate helper functions that exist in base_node.py
- Verify no other imports depend on warm.WarmNode
- TEST: Run app, verify WarmNode still works
- COMMIT: 'Clean warm.py: remove old WarmNode definition'

nodes.title: PHASE 1.2: Clean about.py - Remove old AboutNode class
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Open graphics/about.py
- KEEP: CozyNoteEditor class (used by AboutNode in node_types.py)
- REMOVE: Old AboutNode class definition
- REMOVE: Duplicate utility functions
- Verify no imports reference about.AboutNode
- TEST: Run app, verify AboutNode still works
- COMMIT: 'Clean about.py: remove old AboutNode definition'

nodes.title: PHASE 1.3: Search for orphaned functions
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Use VS Code Find All References to search for:
  * _generate_fallback_title()
  * Old animation setup code patterns
  * Deprecated layout/resize logic
- For each result: determine if still used
- If unused: DELETE and TEST
- Check graphics/ directory for scattered old code
- COMMIT: 'Remove orphaned functions from refactoring'

nodes.title: PHASE 2.1: Audit main_window.py imports
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Open main_window.py
- Review all imports at top of file
- Verify all node imports come from: graphics.node_types
- REMOVE: Any imports from graphics.warm, graphics.about, graphics.node
- REMOVE: Any stale imports from refactoring
- Search codebase for old import paths
- TEST: Run app, no import errors
- COMMIT: 'Fix main_window.py imports to use node_types'

nodes.title: PHASE 2.2: Check graphics/scene.py imports
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Open graphics/scene.py
- Verify imports from graphics.node_types for WarmNode, NodeBase
- Check no stale references to old modules
- Verify NodeScene.add_node() creates WarmNode correctly
- TEST: Create new node via add_node()
- COMMIT: 'Fix scene.py to use node_types imports'

nodes.title: PHASE 2.3: Verify session_manager.py imports
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Open utils/session_manager.py
- Verify NODE_TYPE_MAP (if it exists) has all 4 types:
  * warm (WarmNode)
  * about (AboutNode)
  * image (ImageNode)
  * render (RenderNode)
- Verify imports are from graphics.node_types
- Check NodeBase.from_dict() handles all types
- TEST: Load session with all 4 node types
- COMMIT: 'Verify session_manager imports and NODE_TYPE_MAP'

nodes.title: PHASE 2.4: Check for circular imports
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Verify import direction is correct:
  * base_node.py: standalone (no imports from node_types)
  * node_types.py: imports from base_node.py ONLY
  * session_manager.py: imports from node_types.py
  * main_window.py: imports from node_types.py
- Run: python -c 'import graphics.node_types; print("OK")'
- Run: python -c 'import utils.session_manager; print("OK")'
- Run: python -c 'import main_window; print("OK")'
- Fix any backwards imports
- COMMIT: 'Fix circular import dependencies'

nodes.title: PHASE 3.1: Validate base_node.py core architecture
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Review graphics/node.py (BaseNode class)
- Verify all 4 node types can inherit cleanly:
  * Check __init__ doesn't assume node-specific fields
  * Check paint() doesn't hard-code node-specific rendering
  * Verify paint_content() template method exists
- Verify port system works:
  * Port colors accessible to all node types
  * Port positioning works for all sizes
- Check shadow rendering is correct
- TEST: Create all 4 node types, verify rendering
- COMMIT: 'Validate base_node.py architecture'

nodes.title: PHASE 3.2: Validate node_types.py implementations
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Review WarmNode, AboutNode, ImageNode, RenderNode
- For each node type verify:
  * Has unique brush color defined
  * Has appropriate paint_content() implementation
  * to_dict() includes all type-specific fields
  * from_dict() reconstructs correctly
- Verify font choices are consistent:
  * Title: Chandler42
  * Body: Lato
- TEST: Create each type, edit, save, reload
- COMMIT: 'Validate node_types.py implementations'

nodes.title: PHASE 3.3: Verify port.py/port system integrity
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Review port implementation (likely in base_node.py or separate file)
- Verify input port color distinct from output port
- Verify port positioning works with all node types
- Verify port positions update correctly on node resize
- Verify port colors render correctly on all background colors
- TEST: Toggle ports on all node types
- TEST: Resize nodes with ports visible
- COMMIT: 'Verify port system integrity'

nodes.title: PHASE 4.1: Test all save/load paths
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Create a test session with all 4 node types:
  * WarmNode: with title AND full_text content
  * AboutNode: title-only (or with full_text if supported)
  * ImageNode: with image_path and fallback
  * RenderNode: with source_node references
- Set different port visibility states on each
- SAVE session
- CLOSE and REOPEN app
- LOAD session
- Verify all fields preserved:
  * Titles and text content
  * Node positions
  * Node sizes
  * Port visibility state
- COMMIT: 'Verify all node types save/load correctly'

nodes.title: PHASE 4.2: Check data migration and UUID stability
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Load Cleanup.json session (if it exists)
- Load tester.json session
- Load ActionPlan.json session (this file!)
- Verify all load without errors
- Save each session again
- Compare UUIDs before/after:
  * Open original .json file
  * Note node UUIDs
  * Load and save
  * Check UUIDs are IDENTICAL (not regenerated)
- Verify old sessions from before refactoring still load
- COMMIT: 'Verify UUID stability and old session compatibility'

nodes.title: PHASE 5.1: Review graphics_view.py navigation
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Open graphics/scene.py and main_window.py NodeGraphicsView
- Verify zoom behavior:
  * Alt + Right Mouse drag: up = zoom in, down = zoom out
  * Photoshop-style (smooth, predictable)
- Verify pan behavior:
  * Middle Mouse drag: moves view
  * Works smoothly without stutter
- Verify keyboard shortcuts:
  * Spacebar: implemented or not?
  * Delete/Backspace: deletes selected node
- Search for any references to old node classes
- TEST: Pan, zoom, delete nodes
- COMMIT: 'Verify graphics_view.py navigation'

nodes.title: PHASE 5.2: Verify hover effects consistency
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Create one of each node type
- Hover over each node and observe animation:
  * Expected: 1.025 scale, 400ms duration, OutQuad easing
  * Border should brighten
  * Animation should be smooth
- Verify all 4 node types have SAME animation
- Verify pen brightening works on all color schemes:
  * Hover pen color should be visible on WarmNode bg
  * Hover pen color should be visible on AboutNode bg
  * Etc. for all types
- TEST: Hover on all node types multiple times
- COMMIT: 'Verify hover effects consistency'

nodes.title: PHASE 5.3: Verify resize handle consistency
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Create one of each node type
- For each node type verify:
  * Resize handle appears (bottom-right corner)
  * Drag handle to resize node
  * Minimum size (50px height) is enforced
  * Maximum size works as expected
  * Port positions update correctly on resize
  * Text reflows properly in new dimensions
- Verify Shift+drag maintains aspect ratio:
  * Hold Shift while dragging resize handle
  * Width/height should scale proportionally
- TEST: Resize all node types, verify ports align
- COMMIT: 'Verify resize handle consistency'

nodes.title: PHASE 6.1: Remove dead code comments
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Search for commented-out code blocks in:
  * graphics/node.py (BaseNode)
  * graphics/node_types.py (all node types)
  * graphics/warm.py (if not fully deleted)
  * graphics/about.py (if not fully deleted)
- Delete any old animation attempts
- Delete any legacy hover effect code
- Delete any deprecated resize logic
- Clean up TODO/FIXME comments that are no longer relevant
- Keep useful inline comments that explain WHY code exists
- COMMIT: 'Clean up dead code comments'

nodes.title: PHASE 6.2: Verify and improve docstrings
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Check graphics/node.py (BaseNode):
  * All public methods have docstrings
  * __init__ documents all parameters
- Check graphics/node_types.py:
  * WarmNode, AboutNode, ImageNode, RenderNode documented
  * to_dict() and from_dict() have clear docstrings
  * paint_content() explained
- Check utils/session_manager.py:
  * All public methods documented
  * load_session() parameters and return value clear
  * save_session() parameters and behavior clear
- Add missing docstrings
- COMMIT: 'Add/improve docstrings in core modules'

nodes.title: PHASE 6.3: Add architecture explanation comments
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Add to graphics/node.py (top of BaseNode class):
  * Explain template method pattern:
    - paint() is the template (defined in base)
    - paint_content() is the hook (overridden in subclasses)
- Add to graphics/node_types.py (top of file):
  * Document the 4 node types and their use cases:
    - WarmNode: rich text nodes with editing
    - AboutNode: metadata/info-only nodes
    - ImageNode: image display nodes
    - RenderNode: computed/generated content nodes
- Add to utils/session_manager.py (top of file):
  * Explain the NODE_TYPE_MAP registry pattern
  * Show how from_dict() dispatches to correct node type
- COMMIT: 'Add architecture explanation comments'

nodes.title: PHASE 7.1: Check if nodal.py is still used
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Search for any file named 'nodal.py' in graphics/ directory
- Search entire codebase for 'import nodal'
- Search for 'from graphics.nodal' or similar
- Search for references to classes/functions from nodal.py
- DECISION:
  * If NO references found: DELETE the file
  * If references found: Refactor to import from node_types instead
- TEST: Run app, no import errors
- COMMIT: 'Remove unused nodal.py' OR 'Refactor nodal.py references'

nodes.title: PHASE 7.2: Check if generate_glow_frames.py is used
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Search for any file named 'generate_glow_frames.py' or similar
- Search codebase for 'import glow_frames'
- Search for 'generate_glow_frames()' calls
- Search for references to glow frame generation
- DECISION:
  * If NO references found: DELETE the file (probably pre-rendering)
  * If references found: Understand usage
- Check if port glow effects use pre-generated frames or runtime painting
- TEST: Create nodes with ports, verify glow effect works
- COMMIT: 'Remove unused generate_glow_frames.py' OR similar

nodes.title: PHASE 7.3: Verify graphics/ folder is clean
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- List all files in graphics/ directory
- For each file, verify it's being used:
  * node.py (BaseNode) - KEEP Γ£ô
  * node_types.py (4 node types) - KEEP Γ£ô
  * scene.py (NodeScene) - KEEP Γ£ô
  * Any ports.py/port system - KEEP Γ£ô
  * warm.py (after cleaning) - KEEP OR DELETE
  * about.py (after cleaning) - KEEP OR DELETE
  * Old animation helpers - DELETE if unused
  * Old resize logic - DELETE if unused
- Check for duplicate class definitions
- Check for scattered old code comments
- Goal: minimal, organized, no dead code
- COMMIT: 'Clean up graphics/ folder, remove dead files'

nodes.title: PHASE 8.1: Test node creation and deletion
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Create nodes via 'Node' button (all 4 types if available):
  * WarmNode: click Node button multiple times
  * AboutNode: if menu available
  * ImageNode: if menu available
  * RenderNode: if menu available
- Test loading old session (tester.json or Cleanup.json)
- Test deleting nodes:
  * Select node, press Delete
  * Verify node removed from scene
  * Verify no orphaned objects left
  * Check logs for cleanup messages
- Save session, reload, verify deletions persisted
- TEST: Create/load/delete operations, no crashes
- COMMIT: 'Verify node creation and deletion work cleanly'

nodes.title: PHASE 8.2: Test port visibility interactions
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Create one of each node type
- Toggle port visibility on each node:
  * Method 1: Right-click ΓåÆ Toggle Ports (if implemented)
  * Method 2: Check properties dialog
  * Method 3: Double-click node to edit
- Verify ports appear/disappear
- Verify toggle works AFTER save/load cycle:
  * Create node with ports visible
  * Save session
  * Close and reopen app
  * Load session
  * Verify ports still visible
- Verify port positions are correct:
  * Input port on left
  * Output port on right
  * Vertical center of node
- TEST: All port interactions, save/load
- COMMIT: 'Verify port visibility toggle and persistence'

nodes.title: PHASE 8.3: Test image loading and persistence
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Create an ImageNode (if implemented)
- Test with VALID image file:
  * Select .png, .jpg, or .bmp from filesystem
  * Verify image loads and displays
  * Verify image doesn't distort node aspect ratio
  * Verify image visible when hovering
- Test with INVALID/MISSING file:
  * Try non-existent path
  * Verify fallback text appears (e.g., 'Image not found')
  * Verify no crash
- Test persistence:
  * Create ImageNode with image
  * Save session
  * Close and reopen app
  * Load session
  * Verify image still displays (or fallback if file moved)
- COMMIT: 'Verify ImageNode loads and persists correctly'

nodes.title: PHASE 9.1: Git cleanup and file removal
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- After Phase 7 (dead code removal), decide:
  * Keep warm.py and about.py for historical reference?
  * Or DELETE them entirely?
- If DELETE:
  * Run: git rm graphics/warm.py
  * Run: git rm graphics/about.py
  * Verify no import errors
  * TEST: Run app
  * COMMIT: 'Remove graphics/warm.py and graphics/about.py'
- If KEEP:
  * Add comment at top: 'Legacy file - kept for reference'
  * No active usage, superseded by node_types.py
  * COMMIT: 'Mark graphics/warm.py and about.py as legacy'
- Verify git status clean (no orphaned files)

nodes.title: PHASE 9.2: Update documentation
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Update README.md (if exists) or create architecture doc:
  * Document the node system structure
  * Explain the 4 node types and use cases
  * Document how to create custom node types
  * Document save/load persistence
- Update any architecture diagrams
- Document the template method pattern
- Document the node factory pattern (from_dict)
- Add code examples for each node type
- Document session file format (.json structure)
- COMMIT: 'Update documentation for node system'

nodes.title: PHASE 9.3: Final comprehensive test run
nodes.full_text:
ACTION ITEMS:
- Full smoke test of all features:
  * Create nodes (all types)
  * Edit node content (title and text)
  * Resize nodes
  * Hover over nodes (verify animation)
  * Delete nodes
  * Pan and zoom canvas
  * Toggle port visibility
- Save session
- Close application completely
- Reopen application
- Load same session
- Verify all state preserved:
  * Node count and positions
  * Node sizes and content
  * Port visibility
  * Viewport zoom and center
- If everything works smoothly: COMMIT: 'All cleanup phases complete, app ready for next phase'

nodes.title: META: How to use this ActionPlan.json session
nodes.full_text:
USAGE INSTRUCTIONS:

1. Open this session in the app:
   - Start the app
   - Select 'ActionPlan' from session dropdown
   - All 27 action items load

2. Work through phases sequentially:
   - PHASE 1 (cleanup)
   - PHASE 2 (imports)
   - PHASE 3 (validation)
   - etc.

3. For each node/action item:
   - Read the full_text to understand the task
   - Complete all ACTION ITEMS
   - Run tests specified
   - Make the COMMIT specified

4. Track progress:
   - Keep this session open
   - Pan/zoom to focus on current phase
   - Check off completed items (note in full_text)

5. Final validation:
   - After all phases: run Phase 9.3 (Final test)
   - Verify complete app functionality
   - Commit final cleanup

GOAL: Clean, maintainable, well-documented node system ready for next development phase!
